PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appeared for the San Francisco Public Asministrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he had no news to report and that he had not received any agreement from the parties. Mr Weinkauf asked the Court to uphold the original order for distribution. The Court took the matter under submission. Counsel will submit the order before noon today.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Continued To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for the petitioner.
Mr. Weinkauf reported that Ernest Kuhns has worked out an agreement with his aunt. Counsel requested a thirty day continunace. The Court continued the matter to 10/10/2007.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
